Your name, Your name

[Pre-Chorus]
A             B
We will not be shaken
C#m           E
And fear won't have a hold on us
F#m           B
For You are our God

[Chorus]
E              B
I live for You
C#m            A
My whole life is Yours
E              B
I live for You
C#m            A
My God

[Bridge]
A             B
I am Yours completely
C#m           B
Yours eternally
A             B
I live for You
A             B
I live for You

title: More of You
content:
[Intro]
G - C - Em - D

[Verse 1]
G                 C
I empty myself of my pride
Em                D
With nothing left to hide
G                 C
Fill me with Your love instead
Em                D
By Your Spirit I am led

[Chorus]
G                 C
More of You, less of me
Em                D
Is my heart's only plea
G                 C
More of You, less of me
Em                D
Lord, I want to be like Thee

[Verse 2]
G                 C
Take my life and let it be
Em                D
Consecrated, Lord, to Thee
G                 C
In Your holiness I'll dwell
Em                D
Your great story I will tell

title: Pour and Flow
content:
[Intro]
C#m – A – E – B

[Verse]
E           G#m           A           B
Holy Spirit, come and fill this place
E           G#m           A           B
Let Your presence fall upon us now

[Chorus]
A           C#m
Let the heavens sing of Your great love, Father
E           B
As Your mercy falls on me
A           C#m
Oh revive my soul and Lord make me new
E           B
Let my heart rejoice in You
A      B      E
Holy Spirit, pour and flow

[Bridge/Instrumental]
A – E – B – G#m | C#m – A – E – G#m

title: Praiseworthy
content:
[Intro]
D - G - Bm - A

[Verse 1]
D                 G
From the rising of the sun
Bm                A
To the setting of the same
D                 G
Your great work is never done
Bm                A
Blessed be Your name

[Chorus]
D                 G
You are praiseworthy
Bm                A
Forever and ever
D                 G
You are praiseworthy
Bm                A
I will leave You never

[Bridge]
G                 A
Holy, Holy, Holy Lord
Bm                A
God of power and might
G                 A
Heaven and earth are full
G                 A
Of Your glory and light

title: Send Me
content:
[Intro]
D - A - Bm - G

[Verse 1]
D                 A
The harvest is plenty
Bm                G
But laborers are few
D                 A
Lord, I am ready
Bm                G
I'm looking to You

[Chorus]
D                 A
Here I am, Lord
Bm                G
Send me to the nations
D                 A
Here I am, Lord
Bm                G
Light of all creation

[Verse 2]
D                 A
I will go where You lead
Bm                G
To the hungry I'll feed
D                 A
Planting every holy seed
Bm                G
In Your name I proceed

title: Sing
content:
[Intro]
A - E - F#m - D

[Verse 1]
A                 E
Let the earth rejoice
F#m               D
Lift up every voice
A                 E
To the God of all
F#m               D
On His name we call

[Chorus]
A                 E
Sing, sing for the Lord
F#m               D
Sing, sing of His Word
A                 E
Sing, sing with all your heart
F#m               D
Never let His love depart

[Bridge]
D                 E
Hallelujah, praise His name
F#m               E
Yesterday and today the same
D                 E
Hallelujah, shout it out
D                 E
Without any fear or doubt

title: Spirit of the Living God
content:
[Intro]
E - A - C#m - B

[Verse 1]
E                 A
Spirit of the living God
C#m               B
Fall afresh on me
E                 A
Spirit of the living God
C#m               B
Fall afresh on me

[Chorus]
E                 A
Melt me, mold me
C#m               B
Fill me, use me
E                 A
Spirit of the living God
C#m               B
Fall afresh on me

[Verse 2]
E                 A
Spirit of the living God
C#m               B
Empower every soul
E                 A
Spirit of the living God
C#m               B
Make us clean and whole

title: Take Me
content:
[Intro]
D – G – A – G

[Verse]
D           G           A           G
I’ve been searching for a love that’s true
D           G           A           G
And I found everything I need in You

[Pre-Chorus]
Bm – A – G – D | Em – D/F# – A

[Chorus]
D – A – Bm – G (repeat) | Em – A – D

[Bridge]
Bm – A – G – D | Bm – A – G | Em – D/F# – A

title: Trailblazin
content:
[Intro]
E - F#m - A - B

[Verse 1]
E                     F#m    A                       B
Ahead of the pack keeping up the pace
E                     F#m      A                        B
Together we blaze in God's amazing grace
E                 F#m   A                                    B
Paving the trail     though at times in may seem frail
E                 F#m               A             B
We will pursue for the promise is true

[Chorus]
C#m            B
We'll be blazin' for God
C#m           B
We will fire up the trail
F#m      G#m               A
Zooming onwards with the spirit
F#m                               B
Make way for here we come
We'll be trailblazin'

[Verse 2]
E                           F#m         A                               B
Riding with the spirit his move is strong and fast
E               F#m  A                       B
Be ready anytime don't be left behind
E                     F#m           A               B
Changing old records setting the standards
E                    F#m        A                             B
Live to the fullest for God deserves the best

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
F#m                                       G#m     A
For those who follow the trail be faithful all the way
F#m                                              G#m           A                               B
Strengthening what we've started never giving up when the road is rough

[Chorus]

title: You Are King
content:
[Intro]
D – G – D – G

[Verse]
D                                     G
The height of the mountains, the depths of the earth
D                                     G
Are found in Your mighty hands
D                                     G
The roar of the ocean, the heavens on high
D                                     G
Are Yours O Lord my God

[Pre-Chorus]
Bm           G           D           A
We'll come into Your heavenly courts
Bm           G           D           A
Our heart as an offering

[Chorus]
D
You are King
G
We will go at Your command
Bm
We will serve no other God
G                      D
For You are King

[Bridge]
A           Bm           G
With Your body, And Your blood, We overcome

title: You Have Chosen Me
content:
[Intro]
E – B – C#m – A (2x)

[Verse]
E
Mighty One I thank You for Your goodness
B
Undying love that saved me from the darkness
C#m                  A
You have chosen me, You have chosen me

[Chorus]
E                          B
Heighten my heart's desires to serve You Lord
C#m                          A
To use me as a vessel of Your selfless love
E                          B
Awaken Your spirit in me; fill me with Your grace
C#m
To bear a love like Yours
A            B            E
To bring people back to Your embrace

[Bridge]
E – B – C#m – A

[Instrumental]
C#m – A – B – B | C#m – E – F#m – A – B

[Final Chorus (Key Change to F#)]
F# – C# – D#m – B

title: You're My Disciples
content:
Intro: G -- D -- Em - D - C - G (2X)

G D
There is no greater love
Em  D C G
Than to lay your life for a friend
G D
Lord I'm saved by your blood
Em D C D
My sins are wiped away, my spirit renewed

Refrain:
Em G
You have called me by name
C Dsus/F# - Em
And I'll follow you 'til the end
G
Lord teach me your ways
C G C D
Your will is my command, I will obey

Chorus:
G
You said love one another
D
As I have love you
Em
By this all will know
C D
That you're my disciples (2x)
G – D Em C – D
You’re my disciples

Coda:
G D
We will love each other
Em C D
As long as we shall live (4x)

Repeat Chorus 2x

title: Your Spirit Is Strong
content:
[Intro]
Bm – D – Bm – D | Bm – A – G

[Verse 1]
Bm           D           Em           G
Hear the sound of generations, All in all we come together
Bm           D           Em           G
With one voice we shout Your praises, For You are the Lord of all

[Verse 2]
Bm           A           Em           G
The time has come on this earth now, Take Your place oh Lord my God
Bm           A           Em           G
Let Your glory fall upon us, As we seek Your holy face

[Pre-Chorus]
Em           G
Together as one we’ll go
Em           G           A
We’re living out loud

[Chorus]
D              A
Oh abandoned hearts to the battle cry we move
Em             G
Because Your spirit is strong
D              A
With a holy fire in our souls we’ll carry on
Em             G
Because Your spirit is strong
C              D
Your spirit is strong
